---

## Disposition summary

| SG | Status | Enforcement / Reference |
|----|--------|--------------------------|
| SG1 | ENFORCED | parko-core RSS + posture_engine_v2 + parko-kirra MRC |
| SG2 | ENFORCED | Wiring live via the Option-B adapter (#131 — `crates/kirra-ros2-adapter` slow loop calls `validate_trajectory_containment` per accepted trajectory; rejects collapse the per-asset slot so the fast loop publishes MRC). Lateral margin = 0.40 m per KIRRA-OCCY-SG2-MARGIN-001 (`docs/safety/OCCY_SG2_MARGIN.md`) — assumes G2 AoU #123 (`ε_localization ≤ 0.10 m` 95th-pct). CARLA containment scenario verification documented in `docs/testing/CARLA_SCENARIO_SUITE.md` §C.2 — integrator-environment artefact, not blocking. **Platform generalization (S-PK1 / ADR-0027):** containment now consumes any `PlatformKinematics` via `validate_platform_containment` (footprint-driven, drive-agnostic, additive). Ackermann ENFORCED (unchanged); a non-Ackermann platform (e.g. `DiffDrivePlatform`) is PROVEN through the same seam but a live deployment is DEPLOYMENT-PENDING — **AOU-PLATFORM-GEOMETRY-001**. No new-platform goal is ENFORCED on the seam alone. |
| SG3 | ENFORCED | `validate_vehicle_command` P1–P6 + `validate_cmd_vel` + fabric per-profile envelopes |
| SG4 | DELEGATED | Integrator perception / map prior — SEooC contract #126 |
| SG5 | DELEGATED | Integrator map prior — SEooC contract #126 |
| SG6 | DELEGATED | Impact detection PC1 (#102) — SEooC contract #126 / #127 |
| SG7 | ENFORCED + STRUCTURAL | `classify_http_command` + parity test in `policy_layer::actuator_middleware_tests` |
| SG8 | ENFORCED (Governor side) + DELEGATED (standing-MRC) | `resolve_posture` + LockedOut→403 + Degraded→MRC + `AssetGovernor::evaluate_command` + parko-kirra MRC ceiling. Standing-MRC half: SEooC contract #126. |
| SG9 | ENFORCED | NaN/Inf guard + Unknown denial + staleness fail-closed + WCET CI gate + RSS failsafe |
